name: GET /v1/route/ endpoints
description: Implement route API endpoints for listing and retrieving route details with segment info.
acceptance_criteria: GET /v1/route/:dongle_id/:route_name returns route details with segment list
GET /v1/route/:dongle_id returns paginated list of routes for a device
Response includes route metadata: name, start_time, end_time, segment count
Segment list includes upload status for each file type
Unit tests cover route retrieval, listing, pagination, and not-found cases
go build and go vet pass cleanly
